title: Remove ibr-web from mishal-one-web directory
description: ibr-web is a separate 3.4GB git repo accidentally nested inside mishal-one-web. Move to monorepo root or delete. Already gitignored but consuming disk.
acceptance_criteria: ibr-web/ no longer exists inside mishal-one-web
No broken references in any config

title: Decide CMS: Payload vs Sanity
description: Read docs/cms-evaluation.md and make a binding decision. Key trade-offs: Payload = self-hosted, forms, paywalls, $5-10/mo. Sanity = managed, best media pipeline, $0-99/mo. Decision gates: Do we need native forms? Do we need paywalls? Do we want self-host control?
acceptance_criteria: Decision documented in docs/cms-evaluation.md with rationale
Selected CMS identified for all downstream issues

title: Set up chosen CMS with blog collection
description: Install and configure the selected CMS (Payload or Sanity). Create blog/posts collection with fields: title, slug, body, publishDate, author, featuredImage, tags, status (draft/published), accessLevel. Connect to Astro via REST API or official integration.
acceptance_criteria: CMS admin UI accessible in dev
Blog post CRUD works in admin
Astro fetches posts from CMS API

title: Set up CMS media library
description: Configure media/uploads collection in CMS. For Payload: R2 storage via cloud-storage plugin. For Sanity: built-in CDN with focal points. Wire Astro <Picture> component to render CMS images with AVIF/WebP optimization.
acceptance_criteria: Images served via CDN (R2 or Sanity CDN)
Astro renders optimized responsive images from CMS
Profile photo migrated to CMS media

title: Set up CMS pages collection
description: Create a pages collection for static pages: about, speaking, how-I-work. Fields: title, slug, body, seoTitle, seoDescription, ogImage. Create dynamic route src/pages/[...slug].astro to render CMS pages.
acceptance_criteria: Dynamic routing renders any CMS page
SEO meta populated from CMS fields

title: Set up CMS testimonials collection
description: Create testimonials collection: quote, authorName, authorRole, company, companyUrl, photo. Render on landing page or dedicated section. Signal 12 from Baker framework.
acceptance_criteria: Rendered on site with proper attribution

title: Set up Go High Level account and API key
description: Create GHL Starter account ($97/mo). Generate API Bearer token. Store in .env as GHL_API_KEY. Create initial pipeline: Website Leads. Create initial tags: blog-lead, newsletter-subscriber.

title: Build lead capture form component
description: Create LeadCaptureForm.astro component. Fields: email, firstName. Captures UTM params from URL. Submits to GHL contacts/upsert API via Cloudflare Function (or Astro API route). Success/error states. Inline on blog posts and landing page.
acceptance_criteria: Form renders on landing page and blog posts
UTM params captured from URL and passed to GHL
Contact created in GHL on submit

title: Create GHL welcome email workflow
description: In GHL: create workflow triggered by tag 'blog-lead'. Actions: wait 2 min → send welcome email → wait 3 days → send best-of content email. Template the emails with brand colours.
acceptance_criteria: Welcome email sent within 5 min of form submission

title: Set up UTM tracking and attribution
description: Ensure all external links (social bios, newsletter, paid) include UTM params. Create UTM naming convention doc. GHL captures source/medium/campaign on form submission. PostHog tracks same UTMs for analytics correlation.
acceptance_criteria: All social profile links include UTMs
Form submissions include UTM data in GHL contact
PostHog captures UTM params on page load

title: Set up Buttondown newsletter with RSS-to-email
description: Create Buttondown account. Connect RSS feed (mishal.one/rss.xml). Configure auto-send on new post. Add subscribe form to landing page and blog footer. Style email template with brand colours.
acceptance_criteria: RSS feed connected and pulling posts
Auto-email sends when new post published

title: Create RSS feed endpoint
description: Install @astrojs/rss. Create src/pages/rss.xml.ts that generates RSS from blog content collection (or CMS API). Include title, description, pubDate, link, full content.
acceptance_criteria: Auto-discovery link in <head> (already added in BaseHead)

title: Add share buttons to blog posts
description: Create ShareButtons.astro component with Lucide icons. Platforms: X (Twitter), LinkedIn, copy-link. Pre-populate share text with post title + URL. No external scripts (pure URL-based sharing).
acceptance_criteria: Share buttons visible on every blog post
Copy link button copies URL to clipboard

title: Set up auto-post to X on publish
description: When blog post published: CMS webhook fires → Cloudflare Worker (or GHL workflow) → X API v2 POST. Tweet format: title + URL + 2 relevant hashtags. Requires X API developer account.
acceptance_criteria: X developer account with write access
Tweet posted within 5 min of publish

title: Set up PostHog for content analytics
description: Install PostHog JS snippet. Track: page views, blog post reads, form submissions, newsletter signups, share button clicks. Create dashboard: content performance, funnel (visit → read → subscribe → lead).
acceptance_criteria: PostHog snippet loaded on all pages

title: Build /brand page skeleton (Phase 1)
description: Create src/pages/brand.astro with all 8 sections from docs/backlog.md BRAND-001. Use placeholder content where brand assets don't exist yet. Wire colour palette section to read from design tokens at build time. Add noindex until ready.
acceptance_criteria: Colour palette reads from design tokens (not hardcoded)
Typography section shows Artifika + Atkinson Hyperlegible

title: Add location to footer
description: Baker Signal 5: City/State/Country. Add 'Based in Australia' (or specific city) to Footer component. Builds trust and geographic credibility.

title: Make newsletter signup the primary CTA
description: Baker Signal 3: Primary CTA should be insight emails, not 'Contact Us'. Replace or supplement current landing page links with prominent email signup. Use Buttondown or GHL form. Gold accent button.
acceptance_criteria: Email signup is the most prominent CTA on landing page
Styled with Gold accent (brand CTA colour)

title: Create About page with ICP description
description: Baker Signals 8, 9, 10: Tight focus + ICP + Diagnostic/Roadmap. Create /about page (or section on landing) describing: who you work with, minimum engagement, how you start, what to expect. Not a resume — a positioning statement.
acceptance_criteria: Person schema JSON-LD with sameAs links

title: Create Speaking page
description: Baker Signal 4: Speaking page shows you're in demand. Page with: typical topics, bio (short + long), usable portraits (download), past appearances/podcasts. Add to nav.

title: Set up content scheduling with CMS + cron builds
description: Configure CMS scheduled publishing. Set up GitHub Actions cron (or Cloudflare scheduled worker) to rebuild site every 6 hours. Posts with future publishDate auto-appear when cron fires after their date.
acceptance_criteria: CMS supports setting future publish date
Cron job rebuilds site on schedule
Posts appear on site within 6 hours of scheduled date

title: Create batch content workflow
description: Document the end-to-end flow: batch create 4 posts in CMS → set staggered publish dates → cron rebuilds → RSS updates → Buttondown auto-sends → GHL tracks → PostHog measures. Test with real content.
acceptance_criteria: 4 test posts created with staggered dates

title: Generate OG images per blog post
description: Build-time OG image generation using Astro + Sharp or Satori. Template: Navy background, Gold title text, author name, site URL. Each post gets unique og:image. Fall back to default if generation fails.
acceptance_criteria: Each blog post has unique OG image
Uses brand palette (Navy bg, Gold/White text)
Visible in Twitter Card Validator and Facebook Debugger

title: Add structured data for all content types
description: Extend JSON-LD coverage beyond current WebSite + Person + BlogPosting. Add: BreadcrumbList on all nested pages, FAQPage where applicable, Organization for qrius.global references. Validate with schema.org validator.
acceptance_criteria: No errors in Google Rich Results Test

title: Research and plan paywalled content approach
description: Define what content would be paywalled (deep research reports? templates? tools?). Choose implementation: Payload field-level access + Stripe, or external service (Gumroad, Lemon Squeezy). Document in docs/. This is research only — no implementation yet.

title: Update social links with real URLs
description: Replace PLACEHOLDER LinkedIn URL in src/config.ts. Verify all social links are correct and working: X (@mishalqrius), GitHub (mishaal79), GitHub (QriusGlobal), LinkedIn (real URL), Email.

title: Remove noindex when site is ready for public
description: Currently all pages have noindex. When content and design are ready, remove noindex from BaseHead for public pages. Keep noindex on 404 and any staging pages. Enable sitemap for search engines.

title: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages production
description: Run bun run deploy. Verify mishal.one serves the site. Check: SSL, headers, robots.txt, sitemap, llms.txt all accessible. Confirm Cloudflare caching and performance.
